summary: Tested all 8 features (1A, 1B, 2A-2H) for InkBook iteration 14. Feature 1: Artist card correctly hides gallery/instagram buttons; ArtistModal shows instagram button (gallery button conditionally absent since test artist has no portfolio_images - correct behavior). Feature 2: Full slot sharing chat flow working end-to-end - studio CalendarPlus button, slot panel with tabs, form fields, send disabled state, backend API for creating/booking slots, customer 'Jetzt buchen' button, 'Termin gebucht' status after booking.
critical_code_review_comments: All features correctly implemented and tested
Feature 1A: Artist card (lines 499-542 StudioPage.js) has NO gallery or instagram buttons - only name, bio, styles shown
Feature 1B: ArtistModal (lines 188-215) has modal-gallery-btn (conditional on portfolio_images) and modal-instagram-btn (conditional on instagram) - both correct
Feature 2A-2D: slot-offer-btn CalendarPlus visible for studio_owner only; slot panel with existing/new tabs, form fields, disabled send btn - all correct
Feature 2E: POST /api/messages with slot_offer stores message with status='available'
Feature 2F: POST /api/messages/{id}/book-slot creates booking, updates slot_offer.status to 'booked'
Feature 2G: Customer view shows 'Jetzt buchen' button on slot offer messages
Feature 2H: After booking, slot card shows 'Termin gebucht' in green; booking appears in /api/bookings; double-booking returns 400
seed_data_creation: Created test slots and slot offer messages during testing (dates 2026-09-15 and 2026-10-20 for test_studio)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 14 features verified and working. Test artist (Max Müller) has instagram=@max.tattooist but no portfolio_images, so gallery-btn in modal is absent (correct conditional rendering). The 'Termin gebucht' state is already visible in customer chat from the e2e test slot that was booked. Backend test file test_slot_e2e.py is a reusable regression test.
